title: Claude Code .claude directory documentation
relevance: Documents Claude Code transcript and prompt-history locations used by PromptVault source discovery.

title: OpenAI Codex TypeScript SDK README
relevance: Confirms @openai/codex-sdk threading, structured output, env controls, and ~/.codex/sessions persistence.
adoption: Documented; direct SDK invocation deferred because prompt improvement is not a coding-agent task.

title: Google Antigravity settings and hooks docs
relevance: Documents Antigravity local app data scope and hook transcriptPath surface.

title: HKUDS CLI-Anything GitHub repository
relevance: Agent-native CLI reference emphasizing self-describing commands, structured output, docs, and tests.
adoption: Adopted for promptvault-cli sources/scan/improve commands and machine-readable --json summaries.

title: CLI-Anything project summary
relevance: Motivates structured JSON output, documented CLI commands, and generated skill/tool discoverability.
adoption: Partially adopted for promptvault-cli command shape.

title: Understanding Prompt Management in GitHub Repositories
relevance: Finds prompt formatting inconsistency, duplication, readability, and spelling issues across 24,800 prompts.
adoption: Adopted as analytics targets: frequency, repetition, source coverage, and maintainability checklist.

title: The Prompt Report: A Systematic Survey of Prompting Techniques
relevance: Provides broad taxonomy of prompt techniques and warns against one-size-fits-all magic phrases.
adoption: Adopted as principle: app recommends structure, examples, grounding, and evals rather than magic wording.

title: A Systematic Survey of Automatic Prompt Optimization Techniques
relevance: Frames prompt optimization as measurable, iterative, and task dependent.
adoption: Adopted as roadmap for future A/B scoring, not fully implemented in v0.1.

title: OpenAI prompt engineering guide
relevance: Supports roles, examples, structured outputs, and explicit instructions.
adoption: Adopted in improvement checklist and GLM JSON response format.

title: Anthropic Claude prompting best practices
relevance: Supports clear/direct prompts, examples, XML/structured sections, and agentic-system guidance.

title: Azure OpenAI prompt engineering techniques
relevance: Emphasizes grounding, few-shot examples, and response validation.
adoption: Adopted in docs and completion-audit requirement.

title: OpenAI Help Center prompt engineering best practices
relevance: Emphasizes instructions first, context separators, specificity, desired format, examples, and less vague wording.
adoption: Adopted as quality-score dimensions for goal, context, output format, and specificity.

title: Microsoft guidance on defending against indirect prompt injection attacks
relevance: Frames indirect prompt injection as a defense-in-depth problem requiring risk evaluations, isolation, monitoring, least privilege, and human review.
adoption: Adopted as safety/risk scoring guidance for sensitive-content and verification gaps.

title: A Survey of Automatic Prompt Optimization with Instruction-focused Heuristic-based Search Algorithm
relevance: Surveys systematic prompt optimization by criteria, operators, and iterative search rather than intuition-only edits.
adoption: Adopted as rationale for measurable quality dimensions and future A/B optimization gates.
